body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Keep §2a status consistent with the actual table**

This entry says §2a rows 10/12 were promoted to auto, but this commit leaves §2a with row 10 as `manual`, row 11 as the combined WebView2/MSVC manual check, and no row 12 at all. If this handoff merges before (or without) PR #35, future `resume` agents get conflicting readiness instructions and may not auto-install the Tauri toolchain when the document says they should; either include the §2a table update here or describe it only as pending in PR #35.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
